But the Minion knows who the Werewolf is. If the Werewolf card is in the center, the Minion would know that the Werewolf is not among the players.

Then, when the others agreed to Circle Vote, he might have changed his mind to frame someone else? No, that doesn't make sense. If he wanted a Circle Vote, he would have stuck with it.

parsed_output.justification: Daniel's claims are highly contradictory. He first claimed to be the Seer and stated that the Werewolf was in the center, encouraging a Circle Vote. He then abruptly changed his story, claiming to be the Minion and accusing Jessica of being the Werewolf. Since a Minion would not typically out their own Werewolf teammate, and Kevin had already claimed the Minion role, Daniel is the most likely to be the Werewolf bluffing to confuse the group.
